text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 35 

HOP_MDCR_PMT 

LABEL: Hospital Outpatient Medicare Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total Medicare payments in the hospital outpatient (HOP) setting for a given year. 
The total Medicare payments for HOP are calculated as the sum of CLM_PMT_AMT for all HOP claims 
where the CLM_PMT_AMT >= 0. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: HOP_MDCR_PMT 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12
